perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video is a fast-paced live-action compilation. It begins with two young women standing in front of a Costco Wholesale storefront, holding a large stack of cash and looking extremely excited with wide eyes and bright smiles. (2) The scene transitions into a rapid-fire sequence of product displays inside the warehouse. Objects include an LG air purifier, PlayStation 5 consoles, Philips and Samsung televisions, ASUS laptops, Electrolux washing machines, and Daikin air conditioners. (3) Further segments showcase household goods like Kirkland golf clubs, ZAU electric bikes, TCL and Sharp refrigerators, Bosch dishwashers, and various pieces of furniture like armchairs and mattresses. (4) The final shots feature seasonal and decor items including a 137cm LED Christmas tree, LED reindeer, and Disney-branded printed rugs.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic dance music starts immediately and continues throughout the video. (2) A male voiceover enters, speaking in Mandarin at an extremely fast, rhythmic pace, almost like a rapid-fire auctioneer or rapper, announcing the product names and their discounted prices. (3) The audio environment is a 'Field' style recording where the music and narration are layered over the faint, muffled hum of a warehouse environment. (4) Sharp sound effects (SFX) such as 'ding' or 'swoosh' sounds are heard during price transitions, emphasizing the discounts.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles translate the rapid-fire narration of product models and prices, such as 'LG AIR PURIFIER 360度空氣清淨機'. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: The intro features a large, colorful hook: '折扣金額破百萬! 好市多 千元折扣商品 11/24-11/30 黑五特報第五彈' (Discount amount exceeds one million! Costco thousand-dollar discount products Nov 24-30 Black Friday Report #5) in a variety-show style with glowing effects. (3) Content & Tone: Throughout the video, each product is accompanied by a breakdown of 'Original Price' (原價), 'Discount' (-xxxx), and 'Special Price' (特價) in bold, colorful fonts to evoke excitement and urgency.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Rapid-fire Product & Price Showcase -> Outro Display

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators in intro, 1 male staff member partially visible in background, 2 female shoppers in background shots
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Two young women in casual attire; one wears a white bucket hat, white t-shirt, and ripped jeans; the other has long straight dark hair and a light-colored top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The background consists of high-shelf warehouse aisles, product display stands, price tags, and other shoppers within a large-scale retail environment.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright, even industrial lighting typical of a large retail warehouse.
visual_scene_and_style.season: Winter (based on text for November Black Friday)

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a high-energy promotional shopping guide for Costco's Black Friday sale in Taiwan. It aims to overwhelm the viewer with a sense of value and variety by rapidly listing significant discounts on high-ticket items like electronics and home appliances, encouraging immediate visits to the store during the specified dates.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of the Costco storefront, extensive listing of products available at the store, and clear promotional dates and pricing for the 'Black Friday' event.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: The 'speed-read' narration style combined with beat-synced product transitions is a common signature for viral retail promotion vlogs.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses a 'FOMO' (Fear Of Missing Out) psychological tactic by showing a large stack of cash and countdown-style product reveals.
